home.hero_subtitle: A social network where your talent can change your life. Compete, vote, shop and earn with friends!
home.services_subtitle: Complete platform for all your needs
home.welcome_title: Welcome to "Unique" – The Platform That Helps and Connects!
home.welcome_intro: At "Unique," we believe in the power of community and that everyone deserves a digital space that inspires them, educates them, and connects them with the people they care about. Our platform is designed with dedication and the goal of bringing you a unique experience – from discovering new talents and pursuing education, to creative opportunities with artificial intelligence and brand building. We are here to help you achieve your dreams and goals.
home.welcome_priority: Your satisfaction is our number one priority
home.welcome_feedback: We know that even the best technology occasionally encounters unforeseen obstacles. If you come across any error, or have a suggestion for improvement, please do not hesitate to contact us! Use our
home.welcome_feedback_value: Every piece of feedback you give us is valuable, and we take it seriously.
home.welcome_promise: Because we believe that every user deserves what they paid for – and much more.
home.welcome_thanks: Thank you for being part of the community. Together, we are creating something exceptional!
home.why_unique_discover: Discover what makes our platform stand out from the rest
home.all_in_one_desc: Everything you need in one place - from social networking and entertainment to education, shopping, and AI-powered tools. No need to juggle multiple apps.
home.premium_features_desc: Access cutting-edge AI technology, advanced tools, and exclusive features. Experience the future of social networking with intelligent assistance.
home.earn_while_social_desc: Turn your social activities into income. Create content, offer services, compete in contests, and get rewarded for your engagement and talent.

hero.title: Shadow Arena
hero.tagline: Where terror meets glory. Forge horror with AI, battle live, and claim cash prizes from a pool of fear.

gate.subtitle: Where the dead tell stories. Where the living compete for blood and gold.
gate.lock_desc: Beyond this seal lies the darkest corner of storytelling. Live horror battles, AI-summoned tales, real cash prizes. Speak the rite — pay the offering — and the gate shall open.
gate.price_period: per moon · break the pact anytime
gate.footnote: "The arena does not forget those who refuse the offering."

features.story_desc: Conjure spine-chilling tales with AI — illustrations, ambient sound, narrative twists.
features.voting_desc: Audience sends digital gifts in real time. Each gift = a vote. Top performers win.
features.sound_desc: Curated screams, whispers, ambient drones + AI-generated atmospheric soundscapes.
features.tour_desc: Weekly & monthly tournaments with cash prize pools and a global cursed leaderboard.
features.live_desc: Go LIVE and perform your tale to a terrified audience in real time.
features.vault_desc: Every AI-enhanced horror story preserved with atmospheric illustrations.

aiMentor.title: AI Mentor — personal coach for career, skills & life
aiMentor.description: Get unstuck with an AI mentor trained for career, study and personal growth. Pay per session in credits — no subscription required.

aiMentorHub.title: AI Mentor Hub — pick your coaching track
aiMentorHub.description: Browse AI mentors across business, learning, fitness and creativity. Start a session in seconds.

companions.title: AI Companions — conversational characters that remember you
companions.description: Chat with custom AI companions that learn your style and grow with you. Persistent memory, credit-based, no waitlist.

contentStudio.title: AI Content Studio — generate posts, scripts, captions
contentStudio.description: Spin up social-ready copy, hooks, SEO outlines and ad scripts in one studio. Pay only for what you generate.

aiExperiences.title: AI Experiences — virtual tours & age progression
aiExperiences.description: Plan dream trips and preview yourself decades later. Two AI experiences, transparent credit pricing.

aiTattoo.title: AI Tattoo Designer — custom ink concepts in seconds
aiTattoo.description: Describe the vibe, get studio-quality tattoo concepts. Save your favorites and take them to your artist.

beautyStudio.title: AI Beauty Studio — hair, makeup & skin previews
beautyStudio.description: Try new looks before you commit. AI-rendered hairstyles, makeup and skincare routines tailored to you.

winePairing.title: AI Wine Pairing — perfect bottle for every dish
winePairing.description: Tell us what's for dinner. AI suggests the wine, region and price tier in seconds.

brandBuilder.title: AI Brand Builder — logo, palette & voice in minutes
brandBuilder.description: Launch a brand identity with AI-generated logos, colors and tone guidelines. Export-ready assets.

homeDesigner.title: AI Home Designer — redesign any room from a photo
homeDesigner.description: Upload a room, pick a style, see the makeover. AI-powered interior design, credit-based.

plantCare.title: AI Plant Care — diagnose & save your plants
plantCare.description: Snap a leaf, get a diagnosis and care plan. Watering schedules, light needs, pest fixes — powered by AI.

recipeGenerator.title: AI Recipe Generator — cook with what's in your fridge
recipeGenerator.description: List your ingredients, get a personalized recipe with steps and macros. No more 'what's for dinner'.

mealPlanner.title: AI Meal Planner — weekly plans that fit your goals
mealPlanner.description: Weekly menus tailored to budget, diet and household size. Generated by AI, swappable any time.

foodScanner.title: AI Food Scanner — instant nutrition from a photo
foodScanner.description: Snap your plate, see calories and macros. Track meals without typing a single ingredient.

restaurantAnalyzer.title: AI Restaurant Analyzer — menus, reviews & best picks
restaurantAnalyzer.description: Paste a menu link or upload a photo. AI ranks dishes by reviews, value and dietary fit.

chefChat.title: AI Chef Chat — cooking coach on demand
chefChat.description: Ask an AI chef anything: substitutions, technique, plating. Credits-based, no subscription.

cookingAi.title: AI Cooking Hub — recipes, scanner, planner
cookingAi.description: One hub for every AI cooking tool: recipe generator, food scanner, meal planner and chef chat.

aiGeneration.title: AI Image Generation — turn prompts into art
aiGeneration.description: Premium AI image generation with style controls. Pay per image, own your output.

lotteryAi.title: AI Lottery Picker — data-driven number suggestions
lotteryAi.description: AI analyzes historical draws and suggests number combinations. Entertainment only — play responsibly.

photoRestoration.title: AI Photo Restoration — bring old memories back to life
photoRestoration.description: Restore scratched, faded or torn photos with AI. Original quality, downloadable in minutes.

antiqueAppraisal.title: AI Antique Appraisal — estimate value from a photo
antiqueAppraisal.description: Snap your antique, AI returns an estimated value range, era and authenticity signals.

handwriting.title: AI Handwriting Analyzer — personality from your script
handwriting.description: Upload a sample, get an AI personality and trait read. Entertainment-grade, fun to share.

lieDetector.title: AI Lie Detector — entertainment-grade truth scanner
lieDetector.description: Voice and text analysis returns a fun truth score. For entertainment only — not forensic.

numerology.title: AI Numerology — your numbers, decoded
numerology.description: AI-generated numerology reports based on your name and birth date. Instant, shareable.
